selections.name: Mr Tadashi
selections.reason: Won last start on a Heavy track at Wagga over this distance. Proven in these conditions and maps well.

selections.name: Reel Crystal
selections.reason: Finished a close second to Mr Tadashi last start. Meets him better at the weights and is a major threat.

selections.name: Star Blazer
selections.reason: Third behind the top two last start. Has won on Heavy going previously but carries top weight.

selections.name: County Kilkenny (IRE)
selections.reason: Solid fourth last start on Heavy. Capable of filling the exotics.

danger_horse.name: Reel Crystal
danger_horse.reason: Narrowly beaten by the top pick last start and gets a weight swing.

selections.name: Distant Stripes
selections.reason: Solid third last start on a Heavy track at Wagga. Ready to peak and handles the conditions.

selections.name: Hold This
selections.reason: Resuming from a break with two good trials. Has placed fresh before and draws well.

selections.name: Hot Toddy
selections.reason: Fourth last start on a Heavy track. Deep into the prep and can figure in the finish.

selections.name: Aerial Artist
selections.reason: Sixth last start on Heavy going. On the quick back-up and has minor claims.

danger_horse.name: Hold This
danger_horse.reason: Trial form suggests he is ready to fire fresh.

selections.name: The Ultimate Star
selections.reason: Second last start on a Heavy track at Wagga. Winkers go on and looks ready to win.

selections.name: Rockabye Roxy
selections.reason: Second last start on Soft going. Capable of a better showing from a good draw.

selections.name: My Mate Elvis
selections.reason: Second last start on Soft going. Racing well and has genuine claims.

selections.name: Star Chic
selections.reason: Second last start on a Heavy track. Sound effort last time and can place.

danger_horse.name: Rockabye Roxy
danger_horse.reason: Consistent form and draws perfectly to be a major threat.

selections.name: Mount Ogilvie
selections.reason: Fourth last start on a Soft track. Fitter now and stays in the mix despite the wide draw.

selections.name: Reds Express
selections.reason: Fourth last start on a Heavy track. Tested again but has claims if she can overcome the gate.

selections.name: Speed Of Thought
selections.reason: Resuming. Fourth last start on Soft going. Anticipating a bright start to this prep.

selections.name: Conjola Girl
selections.reason: Sixth last start on a Heavy track. Blinkers come off and can turn things around.

danger_horse.name: Reds Express
danger_horse.reason: Has shown ability on wet tracks and could surprise at odds.

selections.name: One Hard Lady
selections.reason: Resuming with a trial win. Classy mare who has won fresh previously. Looks the one to beat.

selections.name: Vinolass
selections.reason: Second last start on a Heavy track at Wagga. Well placed with the fitness edge.

selections.name: Big Day Out
selections.reason: Resuming with a trial win. Can pull out a big run fresh after the two trials.

selections.name: Toompine
selections.reason: Has been racing well in tougher company. Has ability and looks one of the better chances.

danger_horse.name: Vinolass
danger_horse.reason: Proven on Heavy going and has a fitness advantage over the top pick.

selections.name: Look Here
selections.reason: Second last start on a Heavy track. Won prior on Heavy. Maps well today and can bounce back.

selections.name: Burning Issues
selections.reason: Fourth last start on Heavy. Won prior on Heavy. Deserves another chance.

selections.name: Russian Gangster
selections.reason: Won last start on Soft going. Worth thought after the good maiden win.

selections.name: Perfectly Good
selections.reason: Third last start on a Heavy track. Minor place hope from a good draw.

danger_horse.name: Burning Issues
danger_horse.reason: Proven Heavy track performer who can bounce back to winning form.

selections.name: Heart Balm
selections.reason: Won last start on a Heavy track at Wagga. Claim helps again and can make it two on the trot.

selections.name: Cooranga
selections.reason: Fifth last start on Heavy. Won prior on Soft. Better than the last run suggests.

selections.name: A Book Of Days
selections.reason: Fourth last start on Heavy. Not far away last time and cannot be ruled out despite the weight.

selections.name: Taluk
selections.reason: Third last start on a Heavy track. Finally drawn a decent gate and has solid winning prospects.

danger_horse.name: Cooranga
danger_horse.reason: Has shown ability on wet tracks and can bounce back from a forgiving run.

selections.name: Fire Chat
selections.reason: Won last start on a Heavy track at Wagga. Racing well but must overcome a sticky gate.

selections.name: Unicorn Dreaming
selections.reason: Won last start on a Heavy track. Expected to take some running down again.

selections.name: Iroquai
selections.reason: Won last start on a Heavy track. This is tougher but can measure up.

selections.name: Under Wraps
selections.reason: Ninth last start on Heavy. Won prior on Heavy. Place preferred.

danger_horse.name: Unicorn Dreaming
danger_horse.reason: Impressive last start winner on Heavy going and looks a major threat.
